allow: Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(f'node_id: {d[\\"node_id\\"]}'\); print\(f'neighbor count: {len\(d[\\"neighbors\\"]\)}'\); print\(f'first 3 types: {[n[\\"type\\"] for n in d[\\"neighbors\\"][:3]]}'\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(f'id: {d[\\"id\\"]}, type: {d[\\"type\\"]}, attrs: {d[\\"attributes\\"]}, provenance_count: {len\(d[\\"provenance\\"]\)}'\)")

Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(f'total: {d[\\"total\\"]}, showing: {len\(d[\\"nodes\\"]\)}, names: {[n[\\"attributes\\"].get\(\\"name\\",\\"?\\"\) for n in d[\\"nodes\\"]]}'\)")
